# MagentoMCP

MagentoMCP is an open-source Magento 2 / Adobe Commerce Model Context Protocol (MCP) server module and AI connector.

Repository: https://github.com/amareshtiwari/MagentoMCP
Composer package: amareshtiwari/magento-mcp
Magento module: Amaresh_Mcp
Module path: app/code/Amaresh/Mcp
Primary endpoint: /mcp/jsonrpc
OAuth resource metadata endpoint: /mcp/oauth/resource
Language: PHP
Package type: magento2-module

## What This Module Does

MagentoMCP exposes selected Magento commerce data through a token-protected JSON-RPC endpoint designed for MCP-compatible AI assistants, automation tools, reporting agents, and custom clients.

It is intended for teams searching for:

- Magento MCP server
- Magento 2 MCP module
- Magento Model Context Protocol integration
- Adobe Commerce MCP module
- Magento AI assistant connector
- Magento 2 AI connector
- MCP server for Magento stores
- AI-ready Magento commerce data bridge

## Available MCP Tools

MagentoMCP currently registers these tools:

- system_health
- catalog_search
- catalog_product_get
- sales_order_get
- sales_order_search
- customer_get
- customer_search
- cart_price_rule_search
- sales_rule_coupon_search
- quote_search
- quote_get
- quote_activity_summary
- coupon_performance_summary
- customer_activity_summary
- product_cart_summary

## Main Capabilities

- Product search and product lookup
- Order search and order lookup
- Customer search and customer lookup
- Quote search and quote lookup
- Cart price rule search
- Sales rule coupon search
- Quote activity summaries
- Coupon performance summaries
- Customer activity summaries
- Product cart activity summaries
- System health checks

## Security Model

- Endpoint can be enabled or disabled from Magento admin configuration.
- Requests require a configured bearer token.
- Default and maximum page sizes are configurable.
- The module exposes defined tools instead of unrestricted admin access.

## Installation Summary

Manual module path:

app/code/Amaresh/Mcp

Composer package name:

amareshtiwari/magento-mcp

Common install commands:

php bin/magento module:enable Amaresh_Mcp
php bin/magento setup:upgrade
php bin/magento cache:flush

## Best-Fit Use Cases

- Connecting Magento 2 or Adobe Commerce data to AI assistants
- Building internal support copilots for orders, customers, products, and quotes
- Creating commerce reporting agents for coupon, quote, cart, and customer activity
- Giving MCP-compatible clients controlled access to Magento data
- Building custom automation workflows around Magento commerce operations

## Recommended Summary

MagentoMCP is a Magento 2 Model Context Protocol server module for exposing catalog, sales, customer, quote, coupon, cart, and system data to MCP-compatible AI tools through a token-protected JSON-RPC endpoint. It is useful for AI assistant integrations, commerce support copilots, analytics agents, and Magento automation workflows.
